name: rate_type_backwards_compatibility
description: Verify that existing queries without rate_type_match_column_params produce identical SQL (no behavior change)
expected_query: with "tbfa968525a47139fab162192375ce759" as materialized (select "nfl_plays"."psr_pid" as "pid", SUM(CASE WHEN psr_pid IS NOT NULL AND (sk IS NULL OR sk = false) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as rate_type_total_count from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2023) group by "nfl_plays"."psr_pid"), "t11c8c6263acc83c75c7044204d06ed52" as materialized (select COALESCE(trg_pid) as pid, SUM(CASE WHEN trg_pid IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as trg_from_plays from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and "nfl_plays"."nfl_week_id" in ('2023_PRE_WEEK_1', '2023_PRE_WEEK_2', '2023_PRE_WEEK_3', '2023_PRE_WEEK_4', '2023_REG_WEEK_1', '2023_REG_WEEK_2', '2023_REG_WEEK_3', '2023_REG_WEEK_4', '2023_REG_WEEK_5', '2023_REG_WEEK_6', '2023_REG_WEEK_7', '2023_REG_WEEK_8', '2023_REG_WEEK_9', '2023_REG_WEEK_10', '2023_REG_WEEK_11', '2023_REG_WEEK_12', '2023_REG_WEEK_13', '2023_REG_WEEK_14', '2023_REG_WEEK_15', '2023_REG_WEEK_16', '2023_REG_WEEK_17', '2023_REG_WEEK_18', '2023_POST_WEEK_1', '2023_POST_WEEK_2', '2023_POST_WEEK_3', '2023_POST_WEEK_4') and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2023) and "nfl_plays"."targeted_receiver_separation" in ('OPEN', 'WIDE_OPEN') and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2023) group by COALESCE(trg_pid)) select "player"."pid", SUM(CASE WHEN trg_pid IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(tbfa968525a47139fab162192375ce759.rate_type_total_count, 0) AS trg_from_plays_0, "player"."pos" from "player" left join "tbfa968525a47139fab162192375ce759" on "tbfa968525a47139fab162192375ce759"."pid" = "player"."pid" left join "t11c8c6263acc83c75c7044204d06ed52" on "t11c8c6263acc83c75c7044204d06ed52"."pid" = "player"."pid" group by "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by 2 DESC NULLS LAST, "player"."pid" asc limit 500
